title: Lust's Lobster Pack
description:
Ressource pack that brings a few small overhauls to some textures that fit more to my liking.

Optifine recommended to not miss out on some content!
body:
This ressource pack is designed to add my personnal taste to minecraft, without compromising the essential parts of minecraft.

- Some sounds have been replaced (clicks in menus or buttons, the warden spawning...)
- Paintings have been changed massively
- Creepers have variants (optifine)
- Shulker boxes GUI are more immersive
- Lots of minecraft discs replaced
- Tweaks to the Spyglass Zoom & Cold Effect textures
- Tweaks to the rain, snow, moon, and sun.
- Ridiculous or maybe offensive Splash Texts in menu
